notes: Empirical study running three LLMs over HumanEval/MBPP/QuixBugs (~700 samples) under systematically varied prompting conditions (Direct, Direct+Explain, Full three-step, plus two proposed mitigation prompts), measuring RCRR; the controlled variation of prompt complexity gives it a controlled-experiment flavor, and the root-cause 'over-correction' error analysis adds qualitative analysis. No human participants.
